_comment: Cloudflare Registrar policy. Only TLDs that Cloudflare supports for PROGRAMMATIC registration can be authoritatively confirmed via the domain-check API, so scanning is restricted to this set. Source: Cloudflare Domain Research / Registrar API 'Supported extensions' for programmatic registration. Edit 'supported' to tune; 'restricted' and 'premiumHeavy' are retained for backward compatibility but no longer drive filtering (the 'supported' allowlist does).
_note: TLDs not in 'supported' are excluded from scanning entirely: Cloudflare cannot programmatically register them, so a scan cannot confirm registerability. Register unsupported extensions via the Cloudflare dashboard if needed.
